name: io.github.nonameuserd/paybond
title: Paybond MCP Server
description: Tenant-bound MCP tools for Paybond agent spend controls, evidence, receipts, and settlement.

environmentVariables.name: PAYBOND_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Paybond service-account API key for the tenant-bound MCP session.

environmentVariables.name: PAYBOND_GATEWAY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Paybond gateway base URL. Defaults to the hosted Paybond API.

environmentVariables.name: PAYBOND_ENV_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional local env file path used to load PAYBOND_API_KEY when the host does not set it directly.
